danger_signs.action: Go to the nearest clinic or hospital immediately. Do not wait.
This could be pre-eclampsia. Seek medical help immediately.
A severe headache with swelling or vision changes is dangerous. Go to the clinic now.
If you feel fewer than 10 movements in 2 hours, contact your clinic today.
A fever above 38 degrees during pregnancy needs medical attention.
Sudden swelling of face, hands, or feet can be dangerous. See a doctor today.
Call for help immediately and go to the nearest hospital.
